callouts.label: Update Reminder
callouts.hint: A card on the left reading 'Relaunch to update' with a version number.
callouts.description: Claude Desktop is updated almost every day. When a new build has downloaded, this card appears — click it to relaunch into the latest version.
callouts.tip: Seeing this often is normal. The app really does ship new features that fast.

callouts.label: Local or Cloud File System
callouts.hint: A chip labeled 'Local' at the left of the top context bar.
callouts.description: Chooses whether this session works against your local machine or a cloud virtual machine. Local touches files on your computer; cloud keeps everything on a remote sandbox.
callouts.tip: Cloud sessions can keep running after you close the app; local sessions cannot.

callouts.label: Directory
callouts.hint: A folder chip showing a project name, next to 'Local'.
callouts.description: The working directory this session is scoped to. Claude can read and write files inside this folder — and nowhere else on your machine.
callouts.tip: Always glance here first to confirm you are pointed at the right project.

callouts.label: Git Branch
callouts.hint: A branch icon followed by a name such as 'main'.
callouts.description: The active Git branch for the project. Working on a branch keeps your experiments separate from the main line of code until you're ready to merge.
callouts.tip: If you're not a coder, you can safely ignore this — it matters most in Claude Code.

callouts.label: Working Tree
callouts.hint: A small tag reading 'worktree' after the branch name.
callouts.description: Indicates a Git worktree — a separate checkout of the same repository so an agent can work in isolation without disturbing your main copy.
callouts.tip: Advanced Git feature. Newcomers rarely need to touch it.

callouts.label: Add Files
callouts.hint: A folder-with-plus icon at the right end of the context bar.
callouts.description: Attach additional files or folders to the session's context so Claude can read them while it works.
callouts.tip: Give Claude the reference docs up front and you'll spend less time pasting snippets.

callouts.label: Claude Mascot
callouts.hint: A small orange pixel-art creature in the top-right corner.
callouts.description: A playful animated mascot. It reacts as Claude works — a little personality in an otherwise businesslike toolbar.
callouts.tip: Purely for delight. It has no effect on your results (but it's fun to watch).

callouts.label: Account
callouts.hint: A round avatar with your initials at the bottom-left.
callouts.description: Your account menu. Click your avatar to sign out, switch accounts, or open account settings.
callouts.tip: The initials show which account you're signed into — worth checking if you juggle work and personal logins.

callouts.label: Plan
callouts.hint: Your name followed by a plan name such as 'Max'.
callouts.description: Shows your current subscription plan. Higher plans raise your usage limits and unlock access to the most capable models.
callouts.tip: The plan name here decides how much you can do before hitting a limit.

callouts.label: Permissions & Planning
callouts.hint: A highlighted chip in the toolbar, e.g. 'Bypass permissions'.
callouts.description: Sets how much Claude may do without pausing to ask. It cycles through modes from asking before each action, to planning first, to bypassing approvals entirely.
callouts.tip: 'Bypass permissions' is powerful but risky — it lets Claude act without checking in. Learn the safer modes first.

callouts.label: Voice Dictation
callouts.hint: A microphone icon in the bottom toolbar.
callouts.description: Dictate your request by voice instead of typing it into the box above.
callouts.tip: Speaking a long, messy idea out loud is often faster than typing it neatly.

callouts.label: Model Selector
callouts.hint: A model name near the bottom-right, e.g. 'Fable 5'.
callouts.description: Chooses which Claude model runs this session. Different models trade speed, cost, and depth of reasoning.
callouts.tip: Match the model to the job: a strong model for hard problems, a lighter one for quick tasks.

callouts.label: Effort Level
callouts.hint: A word like 'High' next to the model name.
callouts.description: How much reasoning effort the model spends before answering. Higher effort means more careful, thorough thinking — and a little more time.
callouts.tip: Turn effort up for tricky reasoning; turn it down when you just need a fast answer.

callouts.label: Resources Remaining Circle
callouts.hint: A thin ring or circle at the far bottom-right corner.
callouts.description: A gauge of how much of your usage allowance remains in the current window. As you use Claude, the ring fills; when it's full you may need to wait for it to reset.
callouts.tip: Glance here if responses slow down or pause — you may be near a usage limit.
